'''Klev''' was the 36th generation of [[Klev family|his family]] to attend a prestigious military academy. He was a high-ranking veteran of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After the end of the war, he settled on [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]] and married the heiress of a wealthy trading company. They had a son, [[Titus Klev|Titus]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}}
